stories.title: SAS puts machine learning in marketers' hands with new SAS 360 Marketing AI
stories.simple_summary: A company called SAS created new tools that help marketing teams use AI to do their jobs better.
stories.why_it_matters: If you own a small business and do marketing, this might eventually help you reach customers more easily, but these tools are typically expensive and built for large companies first.

stories.title: AI tools meant to vet science are surprisingly easy to fool
stories.simple_summary: Scientists made AI tools to check if other scientific research is real and correct, but people can trick these checkers pretty easily.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters if you trust science to make important health or business decisions — we need to remember that AI isn't perfect at catching mistakes yet.

stories.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
stories.simple_summary: A former leader at OpenAI (a big AI company) joined the board of a rocket company, suggesting that reusable rockets are becoming popular in Silicon Valley.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: The number of job titles that involve AI, even outside the tech world, is surging
stories.simple_summary: Companies are hiring more people for jobs that involve AI, even in industries that aren't tech companies.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're hiring or job hunting, knowing AI skills are in demand could help you plan for the future.

stories.title: Head of employment service: AI bringing increased unemployment in hi-tech sector
stories.simple_summary: An official in Israel says that AI is starting to cause job losses in the tech industry there.
stories.why_it_matters: This is important to watch — it shows AI is replacing some jobs, though mostly in the tech sector so far.

stories.title: Nvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boom Levels
stories.simple_summary: Nvidia, a company that makes computer chips used for AI, lost a lot of value on the stock market recently.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people who own Nvidia stock — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
stories.simple_summary: The Chinese government warned about possible risks from using Anthropic's Claude Code (an AI assistant).
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to big policy discussions between countries — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
stories.simple_summary: A French AI company released free software that helps AI programs run faster and cheaper on different types of computers.
stories.why_it_matters: This could eventually help bring AI costs down, which might make AI tools more affordable for small businesses over time.

stories.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
stories.simple_summary: A company that makes special computer chips for AI raised a large amount of money from investors at a very high valuation.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and tech industry watchers — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
stories.simple_summary: Workers at Australian docks are asking for a shorter work week (28 hours instead of more) in talks that involve AI automation.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows workers are negotiating with employers about how AI will affect their jobs and hours — a situation that may spread to other industries.

stories.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
stories.simple_summary: Meta (Facebook) created a new AI tool that generates pictures, but people are upset because it may have been trained using photos they posted without permission.
stories.why_it_matters: If you post photos online, you should know that AI companies may use them to train their tools — something to think about when deciding what to share.

stories.title: Anthropic Expands in Manhattan, Part of an A.I. Boom in New York
stories.simple_summary: Anthropic, a major AI company, is expanding its offices in New York as part of a larger AI growth happening in that city.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people watching business trends in New York — nothing you need to act on.
